# Hilmost Software Corporation
> Specialized software R&D unit building high-precision digital tools. Banking-grade engineering for everyday utility challenges.

## Products
- [Hilmost Ultimate Toolbox](https://hilmost-toolbox.hilmost.net): Free online calculators, converters, PDF tools, developer utilities

## About
Founded by Keepy Munyede. Based in Harare, Zimbabwe.
Background: 15+ years banking IT and payments systems (ISO 8583, PCI DSS, SWIFT).
Focus: Finance, health, data science, AI wellness tools.

## Contact
support@hilmost.net
